name: wikipedia_search
description: Searches Wikipedia and returns a summary of the best matching article. Use this to look up facts, definitions, historical events, people, places, or any encyclopaedic topic.

parameters.query: The search term or topic to look up on Wikipedia
parameters.language: Wikipedia language code (e.g. 'en', 'de', 'fr'). Defaults to 'en' if omitted

returns: Article title and summary text from Wikipedia
